ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { applicationName: p('application.name'), applicationInstance: if(p('application.instance')!=null) p('application.instance') else '-', applicationVersion: p('application.version'), serviceName: vars.com_setContext_in.serviceName, serviceType: vars.com_setContext_in.serviceType, env: p('deploy.env') }

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.com_serviceMetadata.LogPayloadLogic != null and vars.com_serviceMetadata.LogPayloadLogic != 'NEVER') payload else if ( p('common.audit.defaultLogPayloadLogic') != 'NEVER') payload else ''
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.com_serviceMetadata.LogPayloadLogic?) vars.com_serviceMetadata.LogPayloadLogic else p('common.audit.defaultLogPayloadLogic') as String

%dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere" --- [ { "tracking": vars.com_tracking, "serviceContext": vars.com_serviceContext,
serviceStatus: vars.com_serviceStatus,
log: { logTimestamp: now() as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ" }, logRole: "INFO", logStep:"END", logText:"Service completed." }, (businessKeys: vars.com_logEnd_in.businessKeys) if(vars.com_logEnd_in.businessKeys?)
} ]

when.expression: ((vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole == 'INFO' or vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole==null) and ${common.audit.role.logInfo}) or (vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole == 'WARNING' and ${common.audit.role.logWarning}) or (vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole == 'ERROR' and ${common.audit.role.logError}) or (vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole == 'DEBUG' and ${common.audit.role.logDebug})

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere" --- [ { "tracking": vars.com_tracking, "serviceContext": vars.com_serviceContext, serviceStatus: vars.com_serviceStatus,
log: { logTimestamp: now() as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ" },
logRole: if (vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole?) vars.com_logAudit_in.logRole else 'INFO',
logStep: if (vars.com_logAudit_in.logStep?) vars.com_logAudit_in.logStep else 'AUDIT', (logText: vars.com_logAudit_in.logText) if(vars.com_logAudit_in.logText?),
(logLongText: vars.com_logAudit_in.logLongText) if(vars.com_logAudit_in.logLongText?)
}, (businessKeys: vars.com_logAudit_in.businessKeys) if(vars.com_logAudit_in.businessKeys?) } ]
